summary: Regression baseline captures full eval state as JSON for CI comparison
context: After tuning cycle achieved 100% effective pass rate, needed a way to detect future regressions when plugin artifacts change.
rationale: A structured JSON baseline with per-scenario scores, thresholds, holdout results, and token budget enables automated CI comparison. The generator script (regression-baseline.ts) is rerunnable so baselines can be refreshed after intentional changes.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Raw output lacks structure for diff comparison and doesn't include token budget metrics

alternatives.option: Hard-code expected values in test assertions
alternatives.reason_rejected: Brittle — every intentional change requires updating multiple test files instead of regenerating one baseline
